For physical and mental health, the final plan uses 'LifeFirst Standard' offerings; in the ground truth these correspond to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' in both physical and mental categories, each rated 9. For property, the final plan lists 'InsurePlus Standard Property Coverage'; the ground truth has 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' under home content with rating 9, which matches the naming and details. For travel, the final plan lists 'InsurePlus Standard Travel Plan'; the ground truth has 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under travel insurance with rating 10. No add-ons were selected, so only these four items are mapped.
